name: Five O'clock Whipped Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar, cocoa powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the hot water until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a boil.
4. Continue boiling for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Gradually add milk to the saucepan while continuing to stir.
6. Heat the mixture until it reaches serving temperature, stirring occasionally.
7. Do not allow the mixture to boil.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
9. Beat the mixture with a rotary beater or whisk until it becomes foamy.
10. Gradually beat in the marshmallow cream until fully incorporated.
11. Serve the whipped chocolate hot.
